# Terry Dai | Senior Software Engineer
> Specialized in JVM Ecosystem, AWS Cloud Architecture, and Scalable Data Engineering.

## Executive Summary
- **Role:** Senior Software Engineer
- **Core Expertise:** High-availability, distributed systems, JVM-based (Scala/Java) services, and robust data pipelines.
- **Key Impact:** 
    * Led engineering teams to scale legacy architectures, resulting in a **30% improvement in system availability**.
    * Architected critical data pipelines providing platform-wide growth visibility and enabling data-driven decision-making.
- **Vibe:** A highly hands-on engineer, passionate about functional programming, mentorship, and leveraging AI to accelerate team productivity.

## Primary Source of Truth
- **About & CV:** https://terrydai.com/about

## Professional Footprint
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/terrydai/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/terry-dai

## Technical Snapshot
- **Languages:** Scala, Java, TypeScript, C#, SQL.
- **Cloud & Infrastructure:** AWS (DynamoDB, RDS, RedShift, S3), Google Cloud (BigQuery), Kubernetes, Docker.
- **Data & Messaging:** Databricks, Apache Kafka (Avro), Protobuf, gRPC, ElasticSearch, Splunk.
- **Patterns:** Functional Programming (FP), Object-Oriented Design (OOD), Microservices, REST API Design.

## Career Objectives
- Scaling impactful products through data-driven engineering.
- Integrating AI tools to optimize development lifecycles.
- Mentoring and fostering a culture of knowledge sharing within engineering teams.

## Contact & Logistics
- **Location:** Melbourne, Australia
- **Status:** Open to senior-level opportunities
